sentence: Terminal conductance is strongly associated with integrated conductivity, yet port-only recovery of the complete configured hidden fields fails.

With microphysics fixed and switching temperature T_sw calibrated or tightly bounded, continuous off-grid, noise, observation-count, and simulator-backed audits support conditional recovery of gamma_sub.
A calibration--protocol disentanglement audit shows that calibration supplies nearly all of the tested gain; protocol variation is a secondary robustness modifier.
The 270-case simulator-backed spot audit supports the configured response-surface transition near the 0.1 K calibration-error marker.
Every bounded trained route evaluated for this study misses at least one blocking gate.
